g.title: X5H_Full_HW_SW_Architecture
g.text: Renesas R-Car X5H (R8A78000 / ironhide) — Full HW/SW Architecture (11-repo derived view)
Sources: android_device, android-manifest, android-kernel-manifest, ddk-km, ddk-um-bin, disfwk_fe, gen5-prebuilts, meta-xt-gen5-platform, meta-xt-x5h-dev, x5h-cr52-dev, x5h-cr52-platform

g.title: RepoMap
g.text: • android_device → device/epam/aosp-xenvm-trout (HWC3, audio HAL, sepolicy, multi-display XML)
• android-manifest → AOSP repo manifest (Trout XenVM, mesa3d, lisot)
• android-kernel-manifest → kernel manifest (xen-troops/linux + ddk-km + disfwk_fe modules)
• ddk-km → Imagination PowerVR Rogue KM driver (pvrsrvkm)
• ddk-um-bin → PowerVR Android userspace (libEGL/GLES/Vulkan, gralloc, mapper)
• disfwk_fe → Linux DRM frontend (DRM_RCAR_RVGC) — RPMsg ↔ CR52 disfwk
• gen5-prebuilts → IPLs / BL31 / OP-TEE / U-Boot / NPU FW / multifwk FW / GPU prebuilts
• x5h-cr52-platform → rcar-xos SDK 4.31 (OSAL, drivers, MW, samples — camfwk/disfwk)
